purpose: Regression seed for SaaS / analytics startup prompts. This IS the vertical where Tailwind-default indigo/violet is sometimes correct — but only sometimes, and the site must still have proper section depth (not just hero+features+pricing+footer collapse).

input.prompt: Сделай лендинг для SaaS-стартапа 'Pulse Analytics' — облачная аналитика для e-commerce. Dashboards с метриками выручки, конверсии, LTV. Демо-видео, тарифы, кейсы клиентов.

notes: SaaS lendings MUST include integrations + case studies sections — without them the page looks like a side-project. Charts/metrics demo should use new kit classes (depth-2, scroll-clip-reveal) introduced in v3 (2026-05-26). Indigo IS acceptable here, but the avoid_any_of warms/pinks would mean the classifier mis-routed.
